grain: one row = one (source, record, flow_stage, year) observation

fields.side: donor = reported by donor/multilateral; recipient = reported by Gov. of Nepal
fields.source: dataset id (oecd_dac2a, oecd_crs, wb_projects, wb_indicators, iati_dportal, adb_iati, us_fa, nepal_dcr, aiddata_gcdf)
fields.source_record_id: native unique id within the source
fields.donor_dac_code: OECD donor identifier as published (ISO-3 alpha in current SDMX)
fields.sector: common taxonomy mapped from DAC purpose prefix (see config/sector_crosswalk.csv)
fields.amount_usd: absolute current (nominal) USD — the PRIMARY measure
fields.amount_usd_constant: absolute constant USD where source provides it
fields.price_base_year: base year for the constant figure (e.g. 2024)
fields.amount_original: amount in the original reporting currency
fields.price_base: current | constant — describes amount_usd as published
fields.year: calendar or fiscal year NUMBER as published (NOT converted)
fields.period_start/period_end: explicit Gregorian bounds of the reporting period
fields.confidence: high | med | low with rationale in the report
fields.dedup_key: key dedupe operates on; for IATI = iati-identifier
fields.is_multilateral_outflow: true for multilaterals' own disbursements to Nepal
fields.counts_in_headline: true only for the non-double-counted headline set FOR ITS SIDE (donor-side headline = OECD DAC2A leaf donors; recipient-side = DCR)

headline_rule: Donor-side and recipient-side headline series are COMPARED, never added. All non-OECD donor sources are counts_in_headline=False (detail/fill).
